title: ctenitis setosa
intro: Ctenitis setosa, also known as Setosan Fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in the management of digestive problems. Ctenitis setosa can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and poultices, to harness its medicinal properties.
